query:
-- Find invoice linked to Leo Grande reservation id=480001
SELECT id, invoiceNumber, status, totalAmount, itemsJson, reservationId, createdAt
FROM invoices
WHERE reservationId = 480001 OR id = (SELECT invoiceId FROM reservations WHERE id = 480001);
